name: ground_truth_si2_flaw_reporting_compliant
description: Ground-truth fixture from active Example System IATT CCIS workbook (row 295, CCI-001226, assessed 2026-05-27). Compliant verdict based on vulnerability management procedural documentation with USD-numbered citations. Nearly identical evidence set to the SI-2.3 flaw correction sibling (CCI-001227) — tests that the harness handles sibling CCIs in the same control with slightly different narrative focus (reporting vs. correction). Evidence type: procedural documentation.

ccis_row.guidance: 001226: The organization reports information system flaws.
ccis_row.procedures: The organization conducting the inspection/assessment obtains and examines the authorization package, verifies the POA&M is up to date and includes recently identified information system flaws, and verifies that the organization has notified appropriate personnel as defined by DoD Cybersecurity policy and organizational roles and responsibilities.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- Vulnerability Scanning Analysis and Reporting Procedures — defines flaw identification and reporting workflow.
- Vulnerability Tracking and Remediation Procedures — defines flaw reporting channels.
- USD00011570 DevSecOps Guide — organizational process for flaw reporting in the CI/CD pipeline.
- USD00008630 Software Development Plan — flaw reporting integration.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Examined Vulnerability Scanning Analysis and Reporting Procedures, Vulnerability Tracking SOP, DevSecOps Guide (USD00011570), and Software Development Plan (USD00008630); confirmed via the cited SOPs that a documented process exists to report identified information system flaws.
